title: Evan and Katelyn Season 4 modpack
description: This is the modpack that Evan and Katelyn created and use for their Season 4 playthough.
body:
This is the modpack that Evan and Katelyn created and use for their Season 4 playthough. 

NOTE: If you are going to try and play this multiplayer, we had to host a fabric server locally on one of our computers and use the Nightly Build for the Distant Horizons mod in order to get it working on both of our computers.

Watch us play on the modpack here:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4K0NAb1BYjM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
